data.body: AC amendment: The RED test should assert absence of 'EVAL CONFIG GUARD' in stderr, not just exit code 0. Record-test-status.sh has multiple code paths that return exit 0 — asserting exit code alone may pass for the wrong reason. The test should capture stderr and assert it does NOT contain 'EVAL CONFIG GUARD', ensuring the RED failure is specifically caused by the guard firing. Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part4.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'EVAL CONFIG GUARD'
